pages.title: Primal Catalyst
pages.text: The Primal Catalyst is a machine that consumes entropy to create advanced materials. It requires an active entropy network to function.

pages.title: Crafting the Catalyst
pages.text: Requires Copper, Furnace, Lapis, Gold, and Blaze Rod. Place it connected to your entropy network.

pages.title: Concentrated Substrate
pages.text: Basic catalyst input. Crafted from Exotic Substrate and Sand.

pages.title: Graviton
pages.text: Graviton is a LATE-GAME material crafted from:$(br)- Phantom Membrane$(br)- Nether Star$(br)- Diamond$(br)- Neutrion Ingot$(br)$()Output: 2 Gravitons per craft

pages.title: Inertial Stability Alloy
pages.text: CRITICAL material for pyramid upgrades! Requires:$(br)- 2x Graviton$(br)- 200 Entropy$(br)$()This is processed in the Primal Catalyst.

pages.title: Entropy Consumption
pages.text: The catalyst consumes entropy directly from your network reservoir. Different recipes have different costs:$(br)- Concentrated Substrate: 20 Entropy$(br)- ISA: 200 Entropy$(br)$()Ensure your pyramid is active and reservoir has enough entropy!
